purpose: Editorial flat lay of fashion accessories — handbag, jewelry, belt, sunglasses — arranged artfully on a premium fabric or surface. No people required.

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Premium fashion accessories flat lay photography, {hero_accessory} as centerpiece — {accessory_descriptor}, surrounded by complementary accessories {supporting_items}, arranged on {surface_descriptor} — premium linen, marble tile, velvet tray, or desert sand, editorial overhead top-down composition, intentional negative space creating breathing room, {color_palette} color story, soft diffused natural daylight or studio softbox from above, hyper-realistic leather, metal, fabric texture detail, no hands, no people, shot on 50mm at f/8, no text, no watermark {cultural_constraints_injection}
anti_patterns: Avoid in output: cluttered messy arrangement
Avoid in output: alcohol or non-halal props
notes: Intents: launch, grow. Saudi adaptation guidance: Accessories flat lay is highly versatile and culturally safe — no human modesty compliance required. Gold jewelry performs particularly well in Saudi fashion content. Oud bottles and bakhoor can be included for multi-brand lifestyle aesthetic. Reference image: Optional. Recommended frequency: 2-4 per week for accessories and fashion brands. Compliance level: standard.
